data.body: PASS 2 verification note (Cluster 2 plan): Confirmed against _advisory_lock.py — live lock constants are base 0.2 / factor 2.0 / cap 5.0 / jitter 0.3 (lines 78-81); CAS constants are base 0.05 / cap 1.0 / jitter 0.3 (lines 101-103) and the CAS path reuses _BACKOFF_FACTOR (=2.0) at line 425 with no separate _CAS_BACKOFF_FACTOR. The plan's 'What' section misstates these (lock base 1.0/factor 1.5/cap 30.0; CAS factor 1.5). Test pins CAP_CEILING=5.0 (line 165).
